description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers, predominantly black with white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoes feature a classic lace-up design with white laces threaded through metal eyelets. The outsole is textured for grip, and the midsole has a visible horizontal stripe detail. The interior lining appears to be a muted green fabric, and the back heel area displays a branded patch. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for urban environments. The shoes are clean and show no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of black high-top canvas sneakers with white laces, rubber toe caps, and a branded heel patch. The shoes are clean and well-constructed, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical lacing, white toe caps, and the high-top silhouette.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the canvas texture, metal eyelets, and the white rubber midsole with stripe detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the branded heel patch and the green interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the canvas upper, laces, and rubber sole.
attribute_logo: Circular patch on the inner ankle area and rectangular patch on the heel, both in black and white.
